Hello! This is the Help Desk. How can I help you?
Hi. I want to install the study app. Does it work on my phone?
Yes! It works on the phone and the computer. It also downloads your lessons.
Great. Does it delete my old files?
No, it does not delete your files. Your progress is safe.
Perfect. I install it now. Thank you!
It works on my phone and computer.
Does it work on my phone?
It does not delete my files.
I download a new lesson every day.

Hi, this is Estephano. I am a tech student, so I use many apps every day. My favorite app helps me study. It works on my phone and on my computer. First, I open the app. Then I download a new lesson. The app saves my files in a folder. It updates every week with new content. I also use a study app for English. It tracks my progress and it sends a message every morning. I love technology because it makes my study easy!

Hello, this is Sara from the App Team. I call about your favorite study app. Good news: there is a new update today. The app works faster now. It downloads your lessons in one minute. To get the update, open the app and click on Settings. Then click Update. If there is a problem, it does not delete your old files. Your progress is safe. Thank you, and enjoy the new version!

Estephano uses his study app. First, he opens the app on his phone. Then he logs in with his email. Next, he downloads a new lesson. After that, the app saves the file in a folder. Finally, he studies and the app tracks his progress.
